title: Nations Odyssey Stone-like
description: A datapack/mod that allows Andesite, Diorite, Granite to be used to create Stone tools! It also has compatibility with Deeper and Darker, and Oh The Biomes We've Gone!
body:
A datapack that lets Andesite, Diorite, and Granite to be used for Stone tools! It is also compatible with [Deeper and Darker](https://modrinth.com/mod/deeperdarker) and [Oh The Biomes We've Gone](https://modrinth.com/mod/oh-the-biomes-weve-gone)!

This datapack was taken from the [Nations Odyssey Modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/nations-odyssey).
